title: Onboarding Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger onboarding design foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Onboarding Design Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Onboarding Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good onboarding design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Onboarding Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
